projects.title: RedPitaya TTL Frequency Divider
projects.description: Python tools for the Red Pitaya STEMlab FPGA board implementing a TTL frequency divider. Useful for synchronisation and timing applications in optical spectroscopy experiments.

projects.title: SNOM Synthetic Holography Preview App
projects.description: Interactive Python application for previewing and processing synthetic holography data acquired by scattering-type scanning near-field optical microscopy (s-SNOM).

projects.title: Multilayer Anisotropic Transfer Matrix
projects.description: Transfer matrix method for computing reflection, transmission, and field profiles in stratified anisotropic optical media. Supports uniaxial and biaxial layers, useful for modelling polariton and near-field responses.
